body: GoogleAdsAdGroupAuctionInsightMetric is part of the GoTicketsAuctionInsightMetric family. It is a fact table at adgroup level for the google_ads domain. Auction metrics for Google Ads Ad Group. Primary identifiers: AdGroupId, AccountId, CampaignId. Key metrics: SearchImpressionShare, TopImpressionPercentage, AbsoluteTopImpressionPercentage. Topics: ads, auction, competitive. Important enums: AggregationPeriod (e.g., 3Day, 7Day, 28Day, Daily).

GoogleAdsCampaignAuctionInsightMetric is part of the GoTicketsAuctionInsightMetric family. It is a fact table at campaign level for the google_ads domain. Auction metrics for Google Ads Campaign. Primary identifiers: CampaignId, AccountId. Key metrics: SearchImpressionShare, TopImpressionPercentage, AbsoluteTopImpressionPercentage, SearchClickShare. Topics: ads, auction, competitive. Important enums: AggregationPeriod (e.g., 3Day, 7Day, 28Day, Daily).

GoogleAdsAdGroupBidChange is part of the GoTicketsBiddingMetric family. It is a fact table at adgroup level for the google_ads domain. Bidding changes for Google Ads Ad Group. Primary identifiers: AdGroupId, LastBidPublishCalculationId, LastCalculationSettingCalculationId. Key metrics: LastBidPublishValue, LastCalculationSettingChangedValue. Topics: ads.

GoogleAdsCampaignBidChange is part of the GoTicketsBiddingMetric family. It is a fact table at campaign level for the google_ads domain. Bidding changes for Google Ads Campaign. Primary identifiers: CampaignId, LastBidPublishCalculationId, LastCalculationSettingCalculationId. Key metrics: LastBidPublishValue, LastCalculationSettingChangedValue. Topics: ads.

MicrosoftAdsAdGroupBidChange is part of the GoTicketsBiddingMetric family. It is a fact table at adgroup level for the microsoft_ads domain. Bidding changes for Microsoft Ads Ad Group. Primary identifiers: AdGroupId, LastBidPublishCalculationId, LastCalculationSettingCalculationId. Key metrics: LastBidPublishValue, LastCalculationSettingChangedValue. Topics: ads.

MicrosoftAdsCampaignBidChange is part of the GoTicketsBiddingMetric family. It is a fact table at campaign level for the microsoft_ads domain. Bidding changes for Microsoft Ads Campaign. Primary identifiers: CampaignId, LastBidPublishCalculationId, LastCalculationSettingCalculationId. Key metrics: LastBidPublishValue, LastCalculationSettingChangedValue. Topics: ads.

Category is part of the GoTicketsCoreEntity family. It is a dimension table at unknown level for the gotickets domain. The GoTickets Event Category. Primary identifiers: CategoryId, ParentCategoryId. Topics: core_entities. Important enums: EventType (e.g., Concerts, Comedy, Sports, Theater).

Event is part of the GoTicketsCoreEntity family. It is a dimension table at event level for the gotickets domain. The GoTickets Event. Primary identifiers: EventId, EventClusterId, VenueId, PrimaryPerformerId, MergedToEventId, ParkingEventId. Topics: core_entities, events, venues.

EventCluster is part of the GoTicketsCoreEntity family. It is a dimension table at event_cluster level for the gotickets domain. The Event Cluster defined as a combination of Primary Performer at a particular Venue. Primary identifiers: EventClusterId, PerformerId, VenueId. Key metrics: IsParking, IsDeleted. Topics: core_entities, venues, performers.

GoogleAdsAccount is part of the GoTicketsCoreEntity family. It is a dimension table at unknown level for the google_ads domain. Google Ads Account Primary identifiers: AccountId. Topics: ads, core_entities.

GoogleAdsAdGroup is part of the GoTicketsCoreEntity family. It is a dimension table at adgroup level for the google_ads domain. Google Ads AdGroup Primary identifiers: AdGroupId, AccountId, CampaignId, BaseAdGroupId. Topics: ads, core_entities.

GoogleAdsCampaign is part of the GoTicketsCoreEntity family. It is a dimension table at campaign level for the google_ads domain. Google Ads Campaign Primary identifiers: CampaignId, AccountId, BaseCampaignId, CampaignBudgetId. Topics: ads, core_entities.

MicrosoftAdsAccount is part of the GoTicketsCoreEntity family. It is a dimension table at unknown level for the microsoft_ads domain. Microsoft Ads Account Primary identifiers: AccountId, CustomerId. Topics: ads, core_entities.

MicrosoftAdsAdGroup is part of the GoTicketsCoreEntity family. It is a dimension table at adgroup level for the microsoft_ads domain. Microsoft Ads AdGroup Primary identifiers: AdGroupId, AccountId, CampaignId. Topics: ads, core_entities.

MicrosoftAdsCampaign is part of the GoTicketsCoreEntity family. It is a dimension table at campaign level for the microsoft_ads domain. Microsoft Ads Campaign Primary identifiers: CampaignId, AccountId. Topics: ads, core_entities.

Order is part of the GoTicketsCoreEntity family. It is a dimension table at order level for the gotickets domain. The GoTickets Order. Primary identifiers: OrderId, CalendarId, EventId, GoogleAdsCampaignId, GoogleAdsAdGroupId, GoogleAdsAdId, MicrosoftAdsCampaignId, MicrosoftAdsAdGroupId, MicrosoftAdsAdId. Key metrics: Quantity, ServiceFee, DeliveryFee, ContractDeliveryFee, InsuranceFee, UnitWholesalePrice, EstimatedInsuranceRevenueShare, InsuranceRevenueCommission, BaseCommission, UpsideCommission, TotalEstimatedCommission, ActualCommission, ItemTotal, TotalWholesalePrice, OriginalCostTotal, OrderTotal, TaxAmount, Zone. Topics: orders, revenue, core_entities, events, dates.

Performer is part of the GoTicketsCoreEntity family. It is a dimension table at performer level for the gotickets domain. The GoTickets Performer. Primary identifiers: PerformerId, PrimaryCategoryId, ParentPerformerId, ParkingPerformerId. Topics: core_entities, performers.

Venue is part of the GoTicketsCoreEntity family. It is a dimension table at venue level for the gotickets domain. The GoTickets Venue. Primary identifiers: VenueId, ParentVenueId, ParkingVenueId. Key metrics: Latitude, Longitude. Topics: core_entities, venues.

EventMap is part of the GoTicketsEntityMap family. It is a mapping table at event level for the gotickets domain. Event centric entity mapping for the GoTickets Events. Primary identifiers: EventId, EventClusterId, VenueId, ParentVenueId, PrimaryPerformerId, CategoryId. Topics: events, venues.

GoogleAdsAdGroupMap is part of the GoTicketsEntityMap family. It is a mapping table at adgroup level for the google_ads domain. AdGroup centric entity mapping for the GoogleAds ad platform. Primary identifiers: AdGroupId, CampaignId, AccountId, EventClusterId, VenueId, ParentVenueId, PrimaryPerformerId, CategoryId. Topics: ads, venues. Important enums: ExportType (e.g., EventCluster, Venue, Performer, NULL if no attribution exists).

GoogleAdsCampaignEventMap is part of the GoTicketsEntityMap family. It is a mapping table at event level for the google_ads domain. Campaign event mapping for the GoogleAds ad platform. Primary identifiers: CampaignId, EventId, AccountId. Topics: ads, events.

GoogleAdsCampaignMap is part of the GoTicketsEntityMap family. It is a mapping table at campaign level for the google_ads domain. Campaign centric entity mapping for the GoogleAds ad platform. Primary identifiers: CampaignId, AccountId, EventClusterId, VenueId, ParentVenueId, PrimaryPerformerId, CategoryId. Topics: ads, venues. Important enums: ExportType (e.g., EventCluster, Venue, Performer, NULL if no attribution exists).

MicrosoftAdsAdGroupMap is part of the GoTicketsEntityMap family. It is a mapping table at adgroup level for the microsoft_ads domain. AdGroup centric entity mapping for the MicrosoftAds ad platform. Primary identifiers: AdGroupId, CampaignId, AccountId, EventClusterId, VenueId, ParentVenueId, PrimaryPerformerId, CategoryId. Topics: ads, venues. Important enums: ExportType (e.g., EventCluster, Venue, Performer, NULL if no attribution exists).

MicrosoftAdsCampaignEventMap is part of the GoTicketsEntityMap family. It is a mapping table at event level for the microsoft_ads domain. Campaign and event mapping for the MicrosoftAds ad platform. Primary identifiers: CampaignId, EventId, AccountId. Topics: ads, events.

MicrosoftAdsCampaignMap is part of the GoTicketsEntityMap family. It is a mapping table at campaign level for the microsoft_ads domain. Campaign centric entity mapping for the MicrosoftAds ad platform. Primary identifiers: CampaignId, AccountId, EventClusterId, VenueId, ParentVenueId, PrimaryPerformerId, CategoryId. Topics: ads, venues. Important enums: ExportType (e.g., EventCluster, Venue, Performer, NULL if no attribution exists).
EventSummary is part of the GoTicketsEventSummary family. It is a fact table at event level for the gotickets domain. The GoTickets Event. Primary identifiers: EventId. Topics: events.

AllTimeDetailedExchangeMetric is part of the GoTicketsExchangeMetric family. It is a fact table at event level for the exchange domain. Event centric Exchange data metrics broken out by exchange name for all time. Primary identifiers: EventId. Key metrics: ExchangeOrders, ExchangeQuantity, ExchangeRevenue. Topics: exchange, revenue, events.

AllTimeStandardExchangeMetric is part of the GoTicketsExchangeMetric family. It is a fact table at event level for the exchange domain. Event centric Exchange data metrics for all time. Primary identifiers: EventId. Key metrics: ExchangeOrders, ExchangeQuantity, ExchangeRevenue. Topics: exchange, revenue, events.

ClosePeerExchangeMetric is part of the GoTicketsExchangeMetric family. It is a dimension table at event_calendar level for the exchange domain. Similar to StandardExchangeMetric but only contains exchange data from GoTickets, TicketNetwork, and VividSeats networks. Primary identifiers: EventId, CalendarId. Key metrics: ExchangeOrders, ExchangeQuantity, ExchangeRevenue. Topics: exchange, revenue, events, dates.

DetailedExchangeMetric is part of the GoTicketsExchangeMetric family. It is a dimension table at event_calendar level for the exchange domain. Event centric Exchange data metrics broken out by exchange name. Primary identifiers: EventId, CalendarId. Key metrics: ExchangeOrders, ExchangeQuantity, ExchangeRevenue. Topics: exchange, revenue, events, dates.

StandardExchangeMetric is part of the GoTicketsExchangeMetric family. It is a dimension table at event_calendar level for the exchange domain. Event centric Exchange data metrics. Primary identifiers: EventId, CalendarId. Key metrics: ExchangeOrders, ExchangeQuantity, ExchangeRevenue. Topics: exchange, revenue, events, dates.

FunnelMetric is part of the GoTicketsFunnelMetric family. It is a dimension table at funnel_metric level for the funnel domain. The GoTickets Funnel Metric. Primary identifiers: TrafficSourceId, CalendarId. Key metrics: ImpressionCount. Topics: funnel, web_analytics, dates.

GoogleAdsFunnelMetricTrafficSource is part of the GoTicketsFunnelMetric family. It is a fact table at adgroup level for the google_ads domain. The Funnel Metric traffic source for the Google Ads platform. Primary identifiers: TrafficSourceId, AccountId, CampaignId, AdGroupId. Key metrics: TrafficSourceIdentifier. Topics: ads, funnel, web_analytics.

MicrosoftAdsFunnelMetricTrafficSource is part of the GoTicketsFunnelMetric family. It is a fact table at adgroup level for the microsoft_ads domain. The Funnel Metric traffic source for the Microsoft Ads platform. Primary identifiers: TrafficSourceId, AccountId, CampaignId, AdGroupId. Key metrics: TrafficSourceIdentifier. Topics: ads, funnel, web_analytics.

EventInventoryMetric is part of the GoTicketsInventoryMetric family. It is a fact table at event level for the inventory domain. Event inventory metric. Primary identifiers: EventId. Key metrics: ListingCount. Topics: inventory, supply, events.

EventOrderMetric is part of the GoTicketsOrderMetric family. It is a dimension table at event_calendar level for the gotickets domain. Event centric order metric. Primary identifiers: EventId, CalendarId. Key metrics: Quantity, OriginalCostTotal, OrderTotal, TotalWholesalePrice, TotalEstimatedCommission. Topics: orders, revenue, events, dates.

GoogleAdsAdGroupPerformanceMetric is part of the GoTicketsPerformanceMetric family. It is a dimension table at adgroup_calendar level for the google_ads domain. AdGroup performance metric for the GoogleAds ad platform. Primary identifiers: AdGroupId, CalendarId, CampaignId, AccountId. Key metrics: Impressions, Cost, Clicks, TotalConversions, TotalRevenue, ProcessedConversions, ProcessedRevenue, PendingConversions, PendingRevenue, CancelledConversions, CancelledRevenue, ProcessedProfit, ActiveProfit. Topics: ads, dates.

GoogleAdsCampaignPerformanceMetric is part of the GoTicketsPerformanceMetric family. It is a dimension table at campaign_calendar level for the google_ads domain. Campaign performance metric for the GoogleAds ad platform. Primary identifiers: CampaignId, CalendarId, AccountId. Key metrics: Impressions, Cost, Clicks, TotalConversions, TotalRevenue, PendingConversions, PendingRevenue, ProcessedConversions, ProcessedRevenue, CancelledConversions, CancelledRevenue, ProcessedProfit, ActiveProfit. Topics: ads, dates.

MicrosoftAdsAdGroupPerformanceMetric is part of the GoTicketsPerformanceMetric family. It is a dimension table at adgroup_calendar level for the microsoft_ads domain. AdGroup performance metric for the MicrosoftAds ad platform. Primary identifiers: AdGroupId, CalendarId, CampaignId, AccountId. Key metrics: Impressions, Cost, Clicks, TotalConversions, TotalRevenue, ProcessedConversions, ProcessedRevenue, PendingConversions, PendingRevenue, CancelledConversions, CancelledRevenue, ProcessedProfit, ActiveProfit. Topics: ads, dates.

MicrosoftAdsCampaignPerformanceMetric is part of the GoTicketsPerformanceMetric family. It is a dimension table at campaign_calendar level for the microsoft_ads domain. Campaign performance metric for the MicrosoftAds ad platform. Primary identifiers: CampaignId, CalendarId, AccountId. Key metrics: Impressions, Cost, Clicks, TotalConversions, TotalRevenue, PendingConversions, PendingRevenue, ProcessedConversions, ProcessedRevenue, CancelledConversions, CancelledRevenue, ProcessedProfit, ActiveProfit. Topics: ads, dates.

DimCalendar is part of the Utility family. It is a dimension table at calendar level for the utility domain. Utility.DimCalendar Primary identifiers: CalendarId. Key metrics: UTC_Hour, UTC_DayOfWeekNum, UTC_WeekOfYear, UTC_ISO_WeekOfYear, UTC_Month, UTC_Quarter, UTC_Year, UTC_ISO_Year, PST_Hour, PST_DayOfWeekNum, PST_WeekOfYear, PST_ISO_WeekOfYear, PST_Month, PST_Quarter, PST_Year, PST_ISO_Year, CST_Hour, CST_DayOfWeekNum, CST_WeekOfYear, CST_ISO_WeekOfYear, CST_Month, CST_Quarter, CST_Year, CST_ISO_Year, EST_Hour, EST_DayOfWeekNum, EST_WeekOfYear, EST_ISO_WeekOfYear, EST_Month, EST_Quarter, EST_Year, EST_ISO_Year. Topics: dates.
